text: This chapter does not apply when a fully autonomous vehicle is operated with the automated driving system engaged and without a human operator.
markdown:
### Chapter 322. Driver Licenses
##### § 322.015 — Exemption

This chapter does not apply when a fully autonomous vehicle is operated with the automated driving system engaged and without a human operator.

subsections.text: This chapter does not apply when a fully autonomous vehicle is operated with the automated driving system engaged and without a human operator.
